title: Transparent Window
body:
This mod makes Minecraft client window transparent.

This mod is a client-only mod for Fabric. Fabric API is **NOT** required.

![Transparent Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kZgPVWYi/images/9dafb2d9d30d8574765c9166290d2f37cc10a34d.png)

![Transparent Singleplayer Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kZgPVWYi/images/eb8b9821f5857c92e68cc1911f603b8d90853f5e.png)

![Transparent World Loading Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kZgPVWYi/images/17e59deec1611e6e5c051fe53b0a1898d4675a4f.png)

![Transparent Loading Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kZgPVWYi/images/c6f882bd45096258f2466f38a6030f2aad32a688.png)
